cards.name: Anthea & Concordia
cards.effect:
You can use this card only if you have N's Darmanitan, N's Zoroark ex, N's Vanilluxe, N's Klinklang, N's Reshiram, and N's Zekrom in play.

During this turn, if your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by your N's Pokémon, take 3 more Prize cards.

cards.name: Boss's Orders
cards.effect: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

cards.name: Buddy-Buddy Poffin
cards.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon with 70 HP or less and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Canari
cards.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Search your deck for up to 4 {L} Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Counter Gain
cards.effect: If you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent, attacks used by the Pokémon this card is attached to cost {C} less.

cards.name: Fighting Gong
cards.effect: Search your deck for a Basic {F} Energy card or a Basic {F} Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Forest of Vitality
cards.effect: Each player's {G} Pokémon can evolve into {G} Pokémon during the turn they play those Pokémon, except during their first turn.

cards.name: Glass Trumpet
cards.effect:
You can use this card only if you have any Tera Pokémon in play.

Choose up to 2 of your Benched {C} Pokémon and attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to each of them.

cards.name: Iris's Fighting Spirit
cards.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

cards.name: Light Ball
cards.effect: Attacks used by the Pikachu ex this card is attached to do 50 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

cards.name: Lillie's Determination
cards.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards. If you have exactly 6 Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

cards.name: Mega Signal
cards.effect: Search your deck for a Mega Evolution Pokémon ex, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Mystery Garden
cards.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard an Energy card from their hand in order to draw cards until they have as many cards in their hand as they have {P} Pokémon in play.

cards.name: N's PP Up
cards.effect: Attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched N's Pokémon.

cards.name: Night Stretcher
cards.effect: Put a Pokémon or a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Nighttime Mine
cards.effect: Attacks used by each Tera Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) cost {C} more.

cards.name: Poké Pad
cards.effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon that doesn't have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

cards.name: Premium Power Pro
cards.effect: During this turn, attacks used by your {F} Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

cards.name: Surfer
cards.effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Archer
cards.effect:
You can use this card only if any of your Team Rocket's Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.

Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Ariana
cards.effect: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If all of your Pokémon in play are Team Rocket's Pokémon, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand instead.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Factory
cards.effect: Once during each player's turn, if they played a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name from their hand this turn, they may draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Giovanni
cards.effect: Switch your Active Team Rocket's Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Team Rocket's Pokémon. If you do, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Great Ball
cards.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for an Evolution Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If tails, search your deck for a Basic Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Hypnotizer
cards.effect: If the Team Rocket's Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Team Rocket's Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Asleep.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Petrel
cards.effect: Search your deck for a Trainer card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Proton
cards.effect:
If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Transceiver
cards.effect: Search your deck for a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Watchtower
cards.effect: {C} Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

cards.name: Thick Scale
cards.effect: The {N} Pokémon this card is attached to takes 50 less damage from attacks from your opponent's {G}, {R}, {W}, or {L} Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

cards.name: Tool Scrapper
cards.effect: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tools attached to Pokémon (yours or your opponent's) and discard them.

cards.name: Ultra Ball
cards.effect:
You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.
Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Urbain
cards.effect: Draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Waitress
cards.effect: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and attach a Basic Energy card you find there to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

cards.name: Prism Energy
cards.effect:
As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides {C} Energy.

If this card is attached to a Basic Pokémon, this card provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Energy
cards.effect:
This card can only be attached to a Team Rocket's Pokémon. If this card is attached to anything other than a Team Rocket's Pokémon, discard this card.

As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides 2 in any combination of {P} Energy and {D} Energy.

abilities.name: Gathering of Blossoms
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for an Erika's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Bind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Stun Spore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Energy Straw
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and this attack does 80 damage for each Energy card you find there.

abilities.name: Boisterous Wind
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Flip a coin. If heads, put an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon into their hand.

attacks.name: Twilight Poison
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

attacks.name: Itchy Pollen
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

abilities.name: Melt Away
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has no Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Lava Burst
attacks.effect: Discard up to 5 {R} Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Incandescent Body
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Sudden Scorching
attacks.effect: Your opponent discards a card from their hand. If this Pokémon evolved from Salandit during this turn, your opponent discards 2 more cards.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

abilities.name: Damp
abilities.effect: Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) lose any Ability that requires the Pokémon using it to Knock Out itself.

attacks.name: Hail Claw
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

abilities.name: Frilled Generator
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if you played Canari from your hand this turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for up to 2 Basic {L} Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Powerful Bolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Volt Switch
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched {L} Pokémon.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ascension
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Cursed Words
attacks.effect: Your opponent chooses 3 cards from their hand and shuffles those cards into their deck.

abilities.name: Wonder Kiss
abilities.effect: When your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out, flip a coin. If heads, take 1 more Prize card. The effect of Wonder Kiss doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Horrifying Revenge
attacks.effect: If any of your Hop's Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Gemstone Mimicry
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Tera Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

abilities.name: Holes
abilities.effect: Whenever your opponent's Active Pokémon moves to the Bench during their turn, place 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spin and Draw
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards.

attacks.name: Seventh Kick
attacks.effect: If you don't have exactly 7 cards in your hand, this attack does nothing.

abilities.name: Double Type
abilities.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is {F} and {P} type.

attacks.name: Counter Jewel
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 2 or fewer Prize cards remaining, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Kick Away
attacks.effect: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Raging Curse
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on all of your Benched Cynthia's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness.

attacks.name: Scarring Shout
attacks.effect: This attack does 70 damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Punk Smash
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Recon Directive
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Put the other card on the bottom of your deck.

attacks.name: Facade
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon is Burned or Poisoned, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Feathery Strike
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Fan Call
abilities.effect: Once during your first turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 {C} Pokémon with 100 HP or less, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. You can't use more than 1 Fan Call Ability during your turn.

attacks.name: Assault Landing
attacks.effect: If there is no Stadium in play, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Magical Leaf
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Big Bite
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Flopping Trap
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Kaleidowaltz
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Ear Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 80 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

Choose up to 2 of your Benched {C} Pokémon and attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to each of them.

cards.name: Jamming Tower
cards.effect: Pokémon Tools attached to each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) have no effect.

cards.name: N's PP Up
cards.effect: Attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched N's Pokémon.

cards.name: Team Rocket's Transceiver
cards.effect: Search your deck for a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand.

attacks.name: Resentful Refrain
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage for each card in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Absolute Snow
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Split Bomb
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage to each of 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Disaster Shock
attacks.effect: You may discard 2 {L} Energy from this Pokémon and make your opponent's Active Pokémon Paralyzed.

abilities.name: Diamond Coat
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Garland Ray
attacks.effect: Discard up to 2 Energy cards from this Pokémon, and this attack does 120 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Tenacious Body
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, flip a coin. If heads, this Pokémon is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10.

attacks.name: Somersault Dive
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 140 more damage. Then, discard that Stadium.

abilities.name: Shadowy Concealment
abilities.effect: If 1 of your {D} Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon ex, that player takes 1 fewer Prize card. The effect of Shadowy Concealment doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Void Gale
attacks.effect: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Counterattacking Crest
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), place 5 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Outlaw Leg
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand. Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

abilities.name: Sky Transport
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ryuno Glide
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Giant Bouquet
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 more damage for each {G} Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crimson Blast
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 60 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Mortal Crunch
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 200 more damage.

attacks.name: Resentful Refrain
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage for each card in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Absolute Snow
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

abilities.name: Resolute Heart
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has full HP and would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, it is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10.

attacks.name: Topaz Bolt
attacks.effect: Discard 3 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Split Bomb
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage to each of 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Disaster Shock
attacks.effect: You may discard 2 {L} Energy from this Pokémon and make your opponent's Active Pokémon Paralyzed.

abilities.name: Electric Streamer
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic {L} Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Iono's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderous Bolt
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

abilities.name: Fairy Zone
abilities.effect: The Weakness of each of your opponent's {N} Pokémon in play is now {P}. (Apply Weakness as ×2.)

attacks.name: Full Moon Rondo
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

abilities.name: Power Saver
abilities.effect: This Pokémon can't attack unless you have 4 or more Team Rocket's Pokémon in play.

attacks.name: Erasure Ball
attacks.effect: You may discard up to 2 Energy from your Benched Pokémon. This attack does 60 more damage for each card you discarded in this way.

abilities.name: Diamond Coat
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Outlaw Leg

abilities.name: Trade
abilities.effect: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Night Joker
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your Benched N's Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

abilities.name: Punk Up
abilities.effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 5 Basic {D} Energy cards and attach them to your Marnie's Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Shadow Bullet
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Flip the Script
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, you may draw 3 cards. You can't use more than 1 Flip the Script Ability each turn.

attacks.name: Cruel Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: X-Boot
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a Basic {P} Energy card, a Basic {M} Energy card, or 1 of each and attach them to your {P} Pokémon and {M} Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Sky Transport
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
